findings.description: Critical: The wp-coordinator-migrate work package includes 'agent-coordinator/evaluation/gen_eval/**' in its 'deny' scope, which will prevent the agent from reading and relocating the per-project descriptors, manifests, and scenarios as required by Task 4.4.
findings.resolution: Remove 'agent-coordinator/evaluation/gen_eval/**' from the scope.deny list in wp-coordinator-migrate to allow the data relocation to proceed.

findings.description: The surgical extraction of GenEvalMetrics (D3) correctly resolves the reverse coupling while leaving coordinator-domain metrics in the service, maintaining a clean dependency boundary without circular imports.

The 'Option B' wheel-install strategy for Docker (D8) effectively handles the monorepo build-context limitation and Railway service-root constraints without requiring infrastructure-level dashboard changes.
The plan for import rewrites is highly thorough, correctly identifying edge cases like literal string fixtures in agent-coordinator/tests/test_check_docker_imports.py and skill docstrings.
